name: CARRIAGE SERVICES INC
business: Carriage Services Inc. is a leading provider of funeral and cemetery services and merchandise in the United States. It operates 155 funeral homes and 28 cemeteries across multiple states, offering services on both atneed (time of death) and preneed (planned prior to death) bases.
sellsTo: Families in need of funeral and cemetery services

exposures.sentence: interruptions or security lapses of our information technology, including any cybersecurity or ransomware incidents;

uncertainty around, and disruption from, new and emerging technologies, such as artificial intelligence ("AI") and generative AI, and the failure to adapt or successfully incorporate such technologies into the Company's business;

catalysts.event: Appointment of Steven D. Metzger as President and COO
catalysts.sentence: On January 16, 2026, Carriage Services, Inc. (the Company) announced that the Board of Directors (the Board) appointed Steven D. Metzger to serve as the Company s President and Chief Operating Officer, effective as of February 2, 2026.
